title: A Heart to Let
writer: Clara Beranger, Harriet Loomis Smith, Sidney Toler
actors: Justine Johnstone, Harrison Ford, Marcia Harris
plot: Agatha Kent inherits a southern mansion from her maiden aunt, Agatha. When she advertises for boarders, Burton Forbes, who is blind and alone in the world, recalls his visits to Aunt Agatha as a boy and rents a room. Assuming the ...
